2605.16776.title: Distinguishable Deletion: Unifying Knowledge Erasure and Refusal for Large Language Model Unlearning
2605.16776.paper_summary: Mitigating sensitive and harmful outputs is fundamental to ensuring safe deployment of LLMs. Existing approaches typically follow two paradigms: Knowledge Deletion (KD), which erases undesirable information during training, and Distinguishable Refusal (DR), which steers models away from using sensitive knowledge during inference. Despite rapid progress, KD-based unlearning struggles with biased deletion due to suppressing specific token sequences as a substitute for complete knowledge removal, whereas DR-based unlearning risks the re-emergence of harmful knowledge because the underlying knowledge remains intact. To address these issues, we propose Distinguishable Deletion ($\mathrm{D^2}$), a paradigm that restricts the response distribution in the latent representation rather than specific tokens to erase undesirable knowledge, while distinguishing it from retained knowledge, enabling a refusal mechanism to handle unlearned inputs safely and coherently. To implement $\mathrm{D^2}$, we introduce an energy index that quantifies the presence of knowledge and the separation between unlearned and retained content. Mathematical and empirical analyses show that energy is both accurate and efficient, enabling Energy-based Unlearning Alignment (EUA) to enforce energy-boundary unlearning during training and apply an energy-based refusal mechanism at inference. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EUA significantly outperforms previous methods, indicating the superiority of $\mathrm{D^2}$. Our code is available at https://github.com/Puning97/EUA-for-LLM-Unlearning.
2605.16776.paper_summary_zh: 減輕敏感和有害輸出對於確保大型語言模型（LLMs）的安全部署至關重要。現有的方法通常遵循兩種範式：知識刪除（Knowledge Deletion, KD），在訓練過程中刪除不良信息，以及可區分拒絕（Distinguishable Refusal, DR），在推理過程中使模型避免使用敏感知識。儘管進展迅速，基於KD的忘記方法因為抑制特定的標記序列作為完全知識移除的替代品而面臨偏見刪除的困難，而基於DR的忘記方法則因為基礎知識仍然完好無損而有重新出現有害知識的風險。為了解決這些問題，我們提出了可區分刪除（$\mathrm{D^2}$），這是一種在潛在表示中限制響應分佈而不是特定標記以刪除不良知識的範式，同時將其與保留知識區分開來，從而啟用一種拒絕機制來安全且連貫地處理未學習的輸入。為了實現$\mathrm{D^2}$，我們引入了一個能量指數，用於量化知識的存在以及未學習內容與保留內容之間的分離。數學和實證分析顯示，能量既準確又高效，使得基於能量的忘記對齊（Energy-based Unlearning Alignment, EUA）能夠在訓練過程中強制執行能量邊界的忘記，並在推理過程中應用基於能量的拒絕機制。大量實驗表明，EUA顯著優於先前的方法，顯示出$\mathrm{D^2}$的優越性。我們的代碼可在https://github.com/Puning97/EUA-for-LLM-Unlearning獲得。
2605.16776.author: Puning Yang et.al.
2605.16776.authors: Puning Yang, Junchi Yu, Qizhou Wang, Philip Torr, Bo Han, Xiuying Chen
